title: Flower Bouquet Building Set, 1020 PCS Botanical Collection Building Block Toy, Rose Flowers Plant Home Decor, Christmas, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day Birthday Gift Toys for Girls Women 6+
features: 🌸BEAUTIFUL ARTIFICIAL FLOWER BUILDING SET -- Create everlasting beauty with this premium DIY bouquet kit! Featuring 1020 PCS high-quality bricks to build 13 lifelike flowers including red rose, sunflower, lily, yellow rose, Campanula, Eucalyptus leaves, chamomile, Brodiaea, violet, Hydrangea, Peony, Tobiraeberry leaves, Eustoma. Perfect for home/office decoration, this no-wilt arrangement adds a touch of elegance to any space. (Please note:No vase included)

🌷ADJUSTABLE FLOWERS & LEAVES -- This innovative plant collection building Block set features fully customizable flowers with swingable petals and adjustable stems, allowing you to design each bloom as a vibrant full blossom or delicate budding flower, The modular design enables endless creative combinations, letting you mix and match styles to craft unique bouquets that showcase your personal aesthetic.

🌹GRACEFUL & ROMANTIC DECORATION - Inspired by nature's seasonal beauty, this exquisite Botanical building block set collection brings together vibrant blooms in a stunning artistic arrangement. transforming into a breathtaking decorative piece. Whether displayed in a vase on your dining table, office desk, bedroom nightstand, or bookshelf, these lifelike floral creations bring a touch of nature's elegance to any space.

🌼PREMIUM QUALITY BRICK SET -- This creative bouquet building set consists made of safe ABS materials. The surface of the building bricks are smooth and burr-free. this creative construction toys kit offers both durability and endless building possibilities. The pieces come intelligently pre-sorted in numbered sub-packages and include a detailed color instruction manual, making assembly straightforward for builders aged 6 and up.

💝PERFECT GIFT FOR GIRLS -- 13 Artificial rose flowers bouquet botanicals collection that won't wilt represent the promise of everlasting love. Whether celebrating Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, birthdays, weddings, Christmas, anniversaries, New Years or Thanksgiving, this unique and charming bouquet is a thoughtful gift to express love to your lover, girlfriend, wife, mother and family members，If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us!
description: Product Description BOTANICAL ROSE BOUQUET BUILDING SET – CREATIVE BOTANICAL DIY SET Craft your own everlasting rose bouquet with this creative building block set! Designed for flower lovers and DIY enthusiasts, this artificial rose collection features richly colored, lifelike petals and stems that snap together easily. Build a custom floral display to brighten your home desk, or give it as a unique birthday gift—no watering needed, never wilts! Perfect for decoration, gifting, or mindful play. BUILDABLE ROSE BOUQUET SET - CREATIVE DIY ARTIFICIAL FLOWERS FOR HOME & OFFICE Infuse your space with lasting elegance and a touch of romance. This botanical building set allows you to craft stunning, lifelike red rose bouquets that become a maintenance-free centerpiece for any room. Once assembled, the vibrant artificial flowers retain their beauty indefinitely, offering the perfect blend of creative building fun and sophisticated home decor. ELEGANT BOTANICAL BOUQUETS, CURATED BY YOUR IMAGINATION 12 Buildable Blooms to unleash your creativity—freely combine and pair them with any vase to brighten up your space. FLEXIBLE & CUSTOMIZABLE STEMS Enjoy full control over your floral designs! Each stem is easily adjustable in length, allowing you to personalize the bouquet to perfectly fit everything from a modern short vase to a classic tall one. CUSTOMIZABLE LEAF ANGLES Fine-tune the angle of every leaf to achieve your desired aesthetic. This thoughtful feature lets you effortlessly shape a fuller, more natural-looking bouquet that displays beautifully from any angle. ADJUSTABLE PETALS FOR DYNAMIC BLOOMS Capture the rose at its most beautiful moment. Freely customize the angle of every petal to recreate any stage of bloom, empowering you to build a uniquely stunning bouquet with your desired visual effect. DIY REALISTIC BOTANICAL BOUQUET BUILDING SET - ELEGANT HOME DECOR • Craft a Personal Sanctuary: Find calm and satisfaction as you build an elegant floral display. Watch a timeless bouquet come to life, piece by piece, ready to brighten your favorite space. • Beauty That Never Fades: Enjoy the luxury of fresh flowers every day, without the upkeep. This intricately designed bouquet stays vibrantly beautiful year after year, silently blooming in your home or office. AN EVERLASTING BOUQUET, BUILT WITH LOVE - DIY ROMANTIC GIFT SET • A Love That Stays in Bloom: Why let a beautiful rose die? This kit lets you build a vibrant bouquet that captures your love at its peak—forever. It's the perfect, permanent Valentine's gift and a powerful symbol of your unending affection. • For All Cherished Moments: Designed for ages 6 and up, it's an unforgettable gift for Christmas, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, birthdays, or anniversaries. It's more than a toy; it's a hands-on project that results in a timeless emblem of beauty and love, forever sealed by your own effort.
